page.title: Small interactive builds that make technical ideas more hands-on.
page.description: This page is a home for browser-based experiments and mini-games. It stays outside the main navigation so it can grow over time without cluttering the core portfolio.

games.title: Dodgeball
games.imageAlt: Preview showing two paddles and a ball in flight across a divided arena
games.summary: A two-player game on one keyboard. Throw balls at your opponent and dodge the ones they throw back. First to lose all health loses.
games.learningGoal: A simplified browser version of the first game I ever programmed, originally built in Lua with drawn characters and animations.

games.title: RGB Guesser
games.imageAlt: Preview illustration for the RGB Guesser web game
games.summary: You are shown a target RGB value and have to choose the matching colour from a small set of swatches.
games.learningGoal: Useful for getting faster at reading RGB values and mentally translating them into visible colour.
